name: Sauteed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the shin and bone from four chicken breasts.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and 3 tablespoons unsalted butter in a large sauté pan or heavy skillet.
3. Sauté the chicken breasts over medium-high heat for 5-10 minutes on each side until lightly browned and opaque. Do not overcook. Transfer to a plate and keep warm.
4. Add 2 chopped green onions to the pan and cook gently for 1 minute.
5. Stir in 2 tablespoons of red raspberry vinegar, then quickly stir in 1/2 cup heavy cream. Let boil for 1 minute.
6. Season with salt and pepper. Spoon sauce over chicken breasts and serve. Serves four.
